description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Benchmark that runs daily at 6:15, 12:15, and 17:15. The workflow also triggers on push events to specific paths in the main, CURA-9906_benchmark branches, and tags matching [0-9].[0-9].[0-9]*. Set up an ubuntu-22.04 environment with Conan and Python 3.10, then run a C++ benchmark and upload results to GitHub.
